programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Famous model Chloe Simpson gets Maggie interested in becoming a model, to Fran and Maxwell's displeasure.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran thinks Maxwell treats his children unfairly when Maggie is not allowed to go to a makeout party but Brighton is encouraged after kissing a relative of Fran's.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Told that the marriage is on the rocks, both Jerry and Elaine admit to being interested in dating Beth and David Lookner. Following George's offhand remark chiding them about their marriage, Beth and David suddenly decide to separate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Even after he and Susan purchase the invitations, George desperately searches for some way to keep their wedding from happening. And as Elaine lobbies to be an usher, Jerry realises that George's marriage will leave him alone with Kramer.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez and Morticia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez has written a play for Wednesday's birthday - Claude & Mable. With Itt set to play the lead, Morticia takes him aside to work on lowering and slowing his voice for the average ear.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Samantha Goes South for a Spell
programme.desc: A vengeful witch, thinking that Samantha is Serena, sends her back to 1868 New Orleans. Darrin must go back and rescue her.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora turns Tabitha into a concert pianist when Sam tries to learn to play the mortal way.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran gets sick and has to have her tonsils removed.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A snowstorm traps the Sheffields, Fran, Niles and CC at Fran's parents' house.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: John and Jeremy are best friends who share a unique springtime hobby: crashing weddings. But when they crash the wedding of the season, John breaks the 'rules' in pursuit of love.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: Someone's keen to find weird ways to kiss, meanwhile it's getting hard for one girl to watch Luis explore connections with others. But Day 3 is too early to get jealous, right?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus Moments
programme.desc: The team give tips and tricks for gardening success, every season of the year. From feeding the lawn, to indoor plants, and everything in between, Trev and the team have it covered.

programme.title: Beyond The Farm: Men At Work
programme.desc: This week, it's 18-year-old Reuben's first autumn in business and there are lessons for the whole team as they take on a super-sized stonework project.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: When Barbie discovers that Duchess the horse is about to be sold, she and Stacie come up with a plan to impress the horse's owners.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: When David outgrows his beloved bike, Barney helps him accept that it's time for a bigger bike. / Barney helps the kids discover how simple acts of kindness inspire others to do the same.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to break the Never Witch's spell and save the dream world, the dream chasers turn the Never Witch's worst memory against her.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: There's a sandcastle-building contest and Benny teams up with Ronny to build something impressive! / After a big storm, Hop is eager to clean up Fair Village using his Rescue Truck.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.desc: The Phantom's Gate gang track down Phelix Payne so Bel can challenge Phelix to a rematch. The Dark Prince has declared this to be the grand finale where nothing will be held back.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Blaze, Zonamos, and Yuni are at an Yggdrasil Research lab on a remote island when a guest suddenly arrives with details about the mysterious Blader S.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Liann feels the pressure when she takes over the school newspaper and makes up stories to get more readers. Can she learn to be an honest reporter?

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Chelsea tells her family about how their puppies defended the dreamhouse from two villains.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams battle for eternal acting glory! Our players face court to determine who stole the last cookie. No crumb will be left unturned, which team will win the case?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chaser's jobs are on the line now that the dream world is under the guardianship of a mysterious new hero called \.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran gets sick and has to have her tonsils removed.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A snowstorm traps the Sheffields, Fran, Niles and CC at Fran's parents' house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez and Morticia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez has written a play for Wednesday's birthday - Claude & Mable. With Itt set to play the lead, Morticia takes him aside to work on lowering and slowing his voice for the average ear.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Samantha Goes South for a Spell
programme.desc: A vengeful witch, thinking that Samantha is Serena, sends her back to 1868 New Orleans. Darrin must go back and rescue her.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: IndyCar Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 NTT IndyCar Series is set to be the 115th official championship season of American open wheel racing and the 31st season under IndyCar Series sanction.

programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.desc: Teams have to build a stunt vehicle that has to go up a ramp and soar through a ring of fire, clear nine LEGO school buses, and explode on the ground which will be captured in slow motion.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran gets sick and has to have her tonsils removed.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A snowstorm traps the Sheffields, Fran, Niles and CC at Fran's parents' house.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: It's midnight on the 13th wedding anniversary of Gomez and Morticia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A nice, violent thunderstorm puts the children in the mood to hear the rest of the story on how their parents met and married.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A witch that Endora had made a deal with centuries before kidnaps Darrin and insists that Samantha marry her wimpish son.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: It's So Nice to Have a Spouse Around the House
programme.desc: While Samantha secretly attends a Witches Council meeting, Serena substitutes for Samantha and Darrin takes her off to a second honeymoon.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.sub-title: Stop the Wedding, I Want to Get Off
programme.desc: Maxwell's sister Jocelyn comes to visit with her fiance, and the two decide to get married.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.sub-title: Sunday in the Park with Fran
programme.desc: CC encourages Grace to go on a playdate with a critic's son in order to get him to like Maxwell's new show, but problems arise after Fran hits the obnoxious child with a baguette.

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: A 13-year-old boy wishes to get bigger in size with the help of a fortune-telling machine. When he wakes up the next morning, he discovers that his wish has been fulfilled.

programme.title: Turner & Hooch
programme.desc: Detective Turner leads an orderly life until it is disrupted by Hooch, a brutish dog that's the sole witness to a murder. Hooch is not only set in his ways but also distressed over his owner's murder.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's strange dancing loses her employees' respect. George cultivates a 'bad boy' image, and Jerry becomes an underground legend after he makes a bootleg video tape of a new movie.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: The recoupling causes crazy tensions in the group, and one raging Islander storms around swearing a lot. The next morning, there's a big kiss reveal - Plus, news of a Bombshell.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: Ready Vet Go
programme.desc: Kenya's owners make a critical decision; Reggie battles a sudden breathing problem at-home and; Archie requires emergency transport after a snakebite. Narrated by Yvie Jones.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus Moments
programme.desc: The team give tips and tricks for gardening success, every season of the year. From feeding the lawn, to indoor plants, and everything in between, Trev and the team have it covered.

programme.title: Beyond The Farm: Men At Work
programme.desc: Reuben and the team take on the challenges of winter during his third season in business.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Chelsea tells her family about how their puppies defended the dreamhouse from two villains.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: For Barney's birthday, the kids make a quilt featuring their favorite thing about him. / Mel realizes the sunglasses she found belong to Grady and Barney helps her decide to return them.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chaser's jobs are on the line now that the dream world is under the guardianship of a mysterious new hero called \.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Shpringadink is the biggest troll holiday of the whole year. / Lonny wants to celebrate her first Jolly Potato, Fair Village's fun and festive winter holiday.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.desc: Phelix has changed and Rashad knows it's because of Bel. The Dark Prince can't stay out of what doesn't concern him. Bashara points out that something's changed in the High Prince too.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: At last, Blader X takes on Tenka. If he loses, Jaxon has to obey one order from his opponent. If she loses, Tenka will let Blader X battle the strongest Blader in the world.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.sub-title: Friends Prank Wars/Pickle's Perfect Pet Feast
programme.desc: Paisley borrows a new piano for her student's recital and must team up with Zac and Olly to make sure it arrives in one piece.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: The friends try out a new escape room, but Barbie and Ken get separated from the others and end up on their own adventure in a mysterious cave.

programme.title: Smashhdown!: Search for The G.O.A.T
programme.desc: The ultimate battle of the artists. The inventive Italian versus the masterful Mexican to see who will produce a stroke of genius and qualify for finals week.

programme.title: Unforgettable Christmas
programme.desc: Princess Colette would rather be a fashion designer than heir to her country's throne. She develops amnesia and works for designer on a collection for a Christmas Eve Gala.

programme.title: Destination Christmas
programme.desc: Emma Warner spends 12 months a year on Christmas at a toy company, leaving no time for dating. She plans a trip to a singles resort, but a booking mistake takes her to a Christmas obsessed town.

programme.title: Innovation Nation
programme.desc: Focused on innovation and investment in new technology. Western Australia is a unique market place dominated by innovation in the aerospace, defence industry, mining, oil and gas and now new energy source sectors such as Hydrogen.

programme.title: English Premier League
programme.desc: Nine presents a replay of the 2025/26 Premier League's Chelsea v Man United from Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: World Endurance Championship: Highlights
programme.desc: The FIA World Endurance Championship is the world's premier international sportscar championship. Highlights from all eight rounds across North America, Europe, Asia and the Middle East.

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The biggest names are invited back to compete on five of Ninja World's toughest obstacles, to break national and international records, win cash prizes and claim all-important bragging rights.
